item.title: A moderately sized DK dump of stolen memes for these trying times 1852.
item.description:
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
Fun stuff. Godspeed to everyone leaving. I’m not. Imgur is home for better or worse. Shall go down with the ship if necessary. Not joining anyone’s server, have searched for decent alternative for years to no avail. Site and app have always been buggy. Not pleased with medialab but believe it or not, while moderation still wildly inconsistent and frustrating, way better and more relaxed than it was year or two ago. Feel few in as good a position as I to make such an assessment. Keep up the lewd and weird shitposting, has been missing from community for years. Bring back rewarding users that post content you dig. Do have a discord account if you leave and get desperate for memes, might be able to assist. Smooches.

item.dc:creator: DrWalters

item.title: I don’t know where else to go
item.description: My Dad passed away. I am so heartbroken. I am so tired of being strong for everyone. I just want to breakdown somewhere safe. I don’t really have any friends. I haven’t been around here in a long time. But I find myself back here, feeling like it’s the only place where I can let it out. I was the only one with him due to circumstances. I feel guilty that somehow, maybe I should have done more. He died in my arms. I am so fed up with life being so hard. I miss my Dad so much. I didn’t realize before how big a part he was in my life. Why?! My Dad was my best friend and now I feel lost. I just needed to let it out, just a little at least. Edit* This is still such an amazing community! Thank you for all the support, sharing your own loss, letting me know I am not alone in this. I got some great advice and most of all shoulders to cry on. Life can get so exhausting and for me I just don't have that many people around (irl). That makes my father's passing all the harder, he was a rock in my life. I appreciate you and all the love and support you have so generously given this internet stranger. Love you all <3
item.dc:creator: everblazinglove

item.title: GovBrief Today - What Happened #212
item.description: iThe authoritarian takeover is escalating, but so is the resistance. ?️? From city halls to state highways, local leaders are drawing lines in the sand to challenge every federal power grab. This Labor Day, the May Day Strong movement is mobilizing to send a clear signal from the people: we see this takeover, and we will not let it go unchecked. Don’t leave truth to the algorithm. Our free and private nightly email arms you with images, data, and quotes so you can see it all for yourself. Add your email at govbrief dot today or on Substack at Gov Brief Today. #GovBriefToday #Resist LINKS [1] https://go.govbrief.today/fema-hiring-freeze-extended [2] https://go.govbrief.today/ice-chantilly-conditions-complaints [3] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-voter-id-order [4] https://go.govbrief.today/cdc-return-office-shooting [5] https://go.govbrief.today/chp-to-protect-harris [6] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-housing-cuts-rural [7] https://go.govbrief.today/chicago-mayor-takeover-preparation [8] https://go.govbrief.today/voice-america-cutting-500 [9] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-slams-chicago-pritzker [10] https://go.govbrief.today/workers-over-billionaires-official SOURCES NBC Chicago, CNN, The Associated Press, Bloomberg Law, Fairfax Now, Newsweek, USA Today, CBS News, Mediaite, The Hill, May Day Strong Hi, Imgur - sort of another crack at this today. We can do pretty later. Right now, this is all about functionality. I heard you on the categories so they're back and they're sort of prioritized. Still working on that system. I'm dumping this out of the website and might add the score without the trending score, categories, and topics. Starting small and scalable. IMPORTANT - Reminder that Imgur has punished me for a transgression they won't identify and has restricted my access to chat. I can see inbound messages. I cannot respond. People are asking where else I post besides here and the website. I'm always going to tell you to subscribe to the email because it's always and we can stay in touch no matter what happens. It's at gbounacos.substack.com but if you prefer another site, I also post this on Instagram, Threads, Bluesky, Reddit, and Facebook. All except Facebook are in my name. You can find me on Facebook by my name, but there is also a Gov Brief Today page.
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.dc:creator: DRMemeWizardPHD

item.title: I remember the imgur of old and it wasnn't that long ago when it was a lot more fun.
item.description: Hey, Business Daddy. I have a couple questions: If every imgurian leaves and never comes back, what will that say about your business daddy model? What will it say about the good ol' sell-out nature of corporate, capitalist greed? Do you remember what imgur was like before you bought it from the Schaafs? I do. I don't know if you were able to turn a profit with all the ads, but I never clicked on a single one of them and I don't know anyone who did. It was a slow migration. Most of the coolest imgurians like razor1000, kylecorn, sarah...I could keep naming names...one by one they decided it wasn't quite fun enough anymore. I'm still here because...well reddit sucks...FB sucks MUCH worse. Like nasty slurping noises while it sucks. I pray to God imgcat.io becomes exactly what imgur used to be. A fun place to kick back and commune with people over memes, cute pets, personal stories, life hacks, food porn. We just aren't seeing as much of that stuff here anymore. So many people have left. I'm not leaving yet, though. There are still good people here and they're why I still like it.
item.dc:creator: Lassannn

item.description:
1 accurate
2
3
4
5
6
7
8
9

16

18
19
20
21
22
23
24
25
26 Imgur Creator Spotlight: @joostbrand does great digital paintings. Check out their posts for more!
27 Man Tax: Anthony Joshua
"Yo, Adrian!" - Rocky Balboa I try to keep my posts "good vibe zones". So, instead of finding the one thing in here you don't like and commenting on it, maybe let it go, don't comment on it and find something that you do like. Seriously y'all. Coming to only comment "omg that's AI" bums me out. Love you long time. So, I made a discord server. It's a relaxed environment where you can take/donate memes to the cause, chat about lots of topics or about nothing at all. Very laid back/relaxed vibe. Come hang with us. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ https://ko-fi.com/mememuseumcurator Small blurb then I won't mention it for a while. I'm in a financial crisis, so if you feel like dropping off a tip in the tip jar, it'd help.
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator

item.title: Chicago Mayor vs 47th Regime Federal Takeover
item.dc:creator: AnonymousMockingjay

item.title: Time for no more billionaires. You should reach $999,999,999.99 cents and then get a plaque that says you won at capitalism. Then the rest goes to provide a social safety net. When people say, “but they earned it,” I respond with, “Yeah, so?…
item.description: “And then I sat, sure. But don’t they also owe a debt to society?” You can’t get that rich without benefitting from many of society’s goods and services. If we help businesses grow that big (and we do), then they should help society when they ‘win.’” They should also realize this is the goal. To win so much that they can devote the remaining earnings to lift up their fellow humans. Shouldn’t people aspire to that? (That’s rhetorical. They should.)

item.title: Mocha
item.description: Noe that i have your attention, I saw a full frontal nudity ai girlfriend ad on instagram and the shit on imgur isnt much better. I mean I was already seeing moe waifu ads during ww2 posts abiut nazi massacres, but now I'm seeing ad after ad with porn hub heraldry and my pattern recognizing human brain is starting to calculate the odds of a data scrape & leak happening. At this point, I'm fully expecting the reveal that something scraped from gurochan is going to pop as an ad

item.title: (FYBD) Imgur Girl Has A Confession…(OC)
item.description:
Her and the whole squad will be participating in the FYBD event by being in a lewd stripper edition set that I’ve already started drawing. O_o The reason i am doing this is because i clearly agree with what's all going on and id like to do my part because i do LOVE this site. Hell, i created characters specifically for it. But the last straw is seeing sooooo many spicy posts over the years that are still up now, yet when i draw a character in a thong it gets removed in literal seconds. Geez like 2 days ago while "The Gif" made it to the front page multiple times and was up for hours, yet when i tried to reposted Ms. Cat Tax in a thong with zero nudity..it gets taken down in under a minute (no BS)... Definity something fucky going on O_o. lol i wish i could post the thong pic so you can see how ridiculously tame it is comparatively lol Welcome to the I.C.U./Imgur Cartoon Universe (Coined By @SteveMND) So our lineup will be -LNI -User-Sub -Oblivion -Miss Cat Tax -The Repost Twins -Front Page -Imgur Girl And possibly a brand new character.
Might even make some nudes :P because some people with daddy issues have a tendency to lash out in unexpected ways...
item.dc:creator: DyingOx

item.title: Reposting Elon...
item.dc:creator: LinneaOnTheBeach

item.title: Cuba is not a communist paradise.
item.description:
REPOST: I had a duplicate image and had to take the whole post down to fix it. I’m a second generation Cuban-American. My grandparents fled Cuba during the revolution and came here. I mentioned this in a comment on a post about Che Guevara and Fidel Castro, and apparently this put me under the witness stand for an online trial about my family being Batista war criminals. This is not the first time that I’ve gone head to head with idiots who have no experience with Cuba outside of their own ideals of it, usually in blind support of Fidel Castro. Everyone who has a purely positive outlook on the Cuban Revolution is right, and the people FROM Cuba that challenge this are “wrong.” It’s one of the most aggravating things I’ve dealt with, and I needed to bitch about it somewhere.
This is the very basic TLDR of the Cuban Revolution. I normally like to make detailed posts with background information and things. I’ve been very sick these past few months - the kind of sick that has you hanging over a toilet and wanting the grim reaper’s number on speed dial. I don’t have the energy to make the quality posts that I like to make. I’m barely able to put this one together as I lay on the bathroom floor. However, I will provide links for those who want to know more! I do have a few images that highlight the human rights violations. As for the outlawing religion part, Fidel Castro announced that Cuba was an atheist state, and it might be an over-generalization to say that religion was “outlawed,” but they did get rid of the clergy in Cuba, and being Catholic was heavily frowned upon. Castro was the new gospel.
Food shortages were and still are rampant in Cuba. Rations aren’t good, and people had to wait in long lines to get a small portion of food. This image is someone’s monthly quota from 2011. EDIT: I failed to mention this and I should have - part of the reason that Cuba’s situation is so dire is because of the devastating effect of the US Trade Embargo. The issue with this is that the food shortage isn’t acknowledged at all. Cuba is still somehow seen as this communist paradise where everything is perfect. It’s also the case that nobody is allowed to TALK about the food shortages because they “don’t exist.” Whenever they’re brought up, it’s always about how it’s America’s fault, and not the fact that nobody is acknowledging the starvation in the first place.
Arbitrary executions of people including minors, where people were killed left and right. Sometimes by firing squad, other times right there on the spot.
This was the comment that started my criminal trial. I have mixed feelings about the revolution that center around: it happened for a reason. You don’t overthrow a government without the support of at least one group of people. There is absolutely no doubt in my mind that Batista was fucking evil. He was basically giving one massive, wet, gargling blowjob to America, at the cost of the people. The problem IS NOT that the people revolted. It’s that the revolution led to an equally terrible dictatorship that led to EXTREME human rights violations that were not seen in the previous regime. Was Castro worse than Batista? That’s the debate everyone is having, and I’m too tired and sick to get into that.
WE FLED BECAUSE PEOPLE WERE BEING STARVED AND SHOT. WHAT PART OF THAT DO YOU NOT UNDERSTAND?????
“There must be a reason that you fled a regime that was shooting kids, outlawing religion, and starving people, and it MUST be that your family are WAR CRIMINALS!!”
Dejate de esa mierta = stop that shit. This was an important interaction for me. Have you ever noticed that everyone that says something about Cuba’s policies online isn’t actually from Cuba? That’s because there’s no real social media in Cuba. Cuba is an isolated bubble. I don’t know what’s happening with my cousins that are still there. I’ve never even met them. My Uncle from Cuba was able to be a part of a program that allowed contact between Cuba and America, but this contact is very limited, and heavily sugar coated, The only things I know are true are what recent Cuban immigrants tell me, so whenever I find one, it’s the first thing I ask. How are things ACTUALLY doing in Cuba now?
For anyone wondering, this is why my grandparents left. My understanding is that my grandma’s mother was subsequently executed for her involvement in the underground movement against Castro. The person who smuggled my grandmother out of Cuba was later executed for doing so. I’m sure they’re all happy about that.
Food Ration Article: https://havanatimes.org/diaries/danae/the-monthly-food-ration/ Execution of Minors: https://www.cubanet.org/htdocs/ref/dis/05210401.htm The Cuban Revolution Overview: https://www.pbs.org/wgbh/americanexperience/features/post-revolution-cuba/#:~:text=January%20and%20February:%20Former%20Batista,meaning%20death%20by%20firing%20squad. The Truth and Memory Project: https://cubaarchive.org/truth-and-memory/the-project/ Overview of Fidel Castro: https://www.independent.co.uk/news/world/americas/the-castropedia-fidel-s-cuba-in-facts-and-figures-432478.html An Opinionated Piece from a Cuban Exile: https://www.miamiherald.com/opinion/op-ed/article270358782.html ^ just so you have more than my limited opinion on it.

item.title: Who had four paws and gets to have dental surgery on Tuesday?
item.description:
This gal! (Edit: HAS. She currently HAS four paws. Jesus fucking tits what a typo!)
Nobody tell her. She's getting dropped off in the morning and I'm spending the last of my vacation hours to pick her up and watch her at home after she's done. You guys helped heaps so I can focus on keeping her feeling safe. Love you guys. <3
